diff --git a/utils/formatters.py b/utils/formatters.py
index 0000000..a1b2c3d 100644
--- /dev/null
+++ b/utils/formatters.py
@@ -0,0 +1,10 @@
+def format_currency(amount: float, symbol: str = '$') -> str:
+    """Return amount formatted as a currency string.
+
+    Args:
+        amount: Numeric value to format.
+        symbol: Currency symbol prefix (default '$').
+
+    Returns:
+        Formatted string, e.g. '$1,234.56'.
+    """
+    return f"{symbol}{amount:,.2f}"
